subcodes.first_line: O Shafi'! The fragrances of the Kingdom have encompassed the realm, and the dove hath warbled upon the branch of divine might. He is come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شفیع قد احاط الملک نفحات الملکوت و سجع الحمام علی غصن الجبروت قد اتی
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @the power of words; of speech, @justice and wrath of God, @personal instructions, @consolation and comfort
